title: Incorrect SPARQL Query evaluation
description:
Commit: 3e7d542
Database: here
Query: PREFIX qb: <http://purl.org/linked-data/cube#>
PREFIX skos:    <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX druh-duchodu: <http://linked.cssz.cz/resource/pension-kind/>
PREFIX vek: <http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?vek ?kategorie ?prvni ?druhy ?treti
WHERE {
?observation a qb:Observation ;
<http://linked.cssz.cz/ontology/dataset-definitions/penze#vekova-kategorie> ?vek;
qb:dataSet <http://linked.cssz.cz/dataset/penze/duchody-dle-veku> .
BIND (IF(?vek IN(vek:Y20T24, vek:Y25T29, vek:Y30T34, vek:Y35T39, vek:Y40T44, vek:Y45T49, vek:Y50T54, vek:Y55T59),1,0) AS ?prvni)
BIND (IF(?vek = vek:Y60T64,2,0) AS ?druhy)
BIND (IF(?vek IN (vek:Y65T69, vek:Y70T74, vek:Y75T79, vek:Y80T84, vek:Y85T89, vek:Y_GE90),3,0) AS ?treti)
BIND (?prvni + ?druhy + ?treti AS ?kategorie)
FILTER(?kategorie != 0)
}

Results yield e.g. (notice the ?kateorie = 0 when we explicitly query for ?kategorie != 0):

vek                                              kategorie  prvni   druhy    treti
http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/Y50T54 0   0   0   0
http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/Y55T59 0   0   0   0
Also compare the query result with and without the FILTER line. It also varies in the other variables. Let's focus on http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/Y60T64
Without filter:

vek                                              kategorie  prvni   druhy    treti
http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/Y60T64 2   0   2   0
With filter:

vek                                              kategorie  prvni   druhy    treti
http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/Y60T64 3   0   0   3
http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/Y60T64 0   0   0   0
http://linked.opendata.cz/generated/resource/age/Y60T64 1   1   0   0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE observations (id UInt32, vek String, dataset String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO observations (id, vek, dataset) VALUES (1, 'vek:Y60T64', 'http://linked.cssz.cz/dataset/penze/duchody-dle-veku');
INSERT INTO observations (id, vek, dataset) VALUES (2, 'vek:Y50T54', 'http://linked.cssz.cz/dataset/penze/duchody-dle-veku');

SELECT vek, IF(vek IN ('vek:Y20T24', 'vek:Y25T29', 'vek:Y30T34', 'vek:Y35T39', 'vek:Y40T44', 'vek:Y45T49', 'vek:Y50T54', 'vek:Y55T59'), 1, 0) AS prvni, IF(vek = 'vek:Y60T64', 2, 0) AS druhy, IF(vek IN ('vek:Y65T69', 'vek:Y70T74', 'vek:Y75T79', 'vek:Y80T84', 'vek:Y85T89', 'vek:Y_GE90'), 3, 0) AS treti FROM observations WHERE vek IS NOT NULL;

SELECT vek, IF(vek IN ('vek:Y20T24', 'vek:Y25T29', 'vek:Y30T34', 'vek:Y35T39', 'vek:Y40T44', 'vek:Y45T49', 'vek:Y50T54', 'vek:Y55T59'), 1, 0) + IF(vek = 'vek:Y60T64', 2, 0) + IF(vek IN ('vek:Y65T69', 'vek:Y70T74', 'vek:Y75T79', 'vek:Y80T84', 'vek:Y85T89', 'vek:Y_GE90'), 3, 0) AS kategorie FROM observations HAVING kategorie != 0;
